system.text: You are a conversion-test assistant. Think briefly, then use the routing decision tool exactly once.

content.text: Choose a provider for chat request req_fixture_stream_001. OpenAI has wait_ms=1800 and error_rate=0.12. Anthropic has wait_ms=120 and error_rate=0.01. Gemini has wait_ms=400 and error_rate=0.04. Call get_route_decision with the best provider and a short reason.

tools.name: get_route_decision
tools.description: Record the selected upstream provider for a chat request.
